items.title: Gambia appoints British barrister to prosecute gruesome Jammeh-era crimes
items.dek: Ex-President Yahya Jammeh's 22-year rule was known for enforced disappearances and extrajudicial killings.
items.body: Ex-President Yahya Jammeh's 22-year rule was known for enforced disappearances and extrajudicial killings.

items.title: Ships still cautious about using Strait of Hormuz as Iran issues warning
items.dek: Only a few vessels have crossed the strait since the US-Iran ceasefire deal, according to BBC Verify analysis.
items.body: Only a few vessels have crossed the strait since the US-Iran ceasefire deal, according to BBC Verify analysis.
